name: Chocolate Zabaglione
recipeInstructions:
1. In a double boiler over low heat, beat the egg yolks with the sugar until foamy.
2. Melt the chocolate in a separate double boiler.
3. Add the sherry and heavy cream to the melted chocolate.
4. Slowly pour the chocolate mixture into the egg yolk mixture while whisking continuously until the mixture thickens.
